mapper.select: SELECT id, meter_id, meter_num, tasks_id, instruction_type, instruction, status, instruction_status, send_time, in_temp, out_temp, room_temp, valve_open, create_time FROM ht_tasks_perform WHERE meter_id = #{meterId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, meter_id, meter_num, tasks_id, instruction_type, instruction, number, intervall, status, instruction_status, send_time, in_temp, out_temp, room_temp, valve_open, out_temp_pj, dtu_num, chan_num, create_time FROM ht_tasks_perform WHERE meter_id = #{meterId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE pr_heat_valve_archive SET valve_status = #{valveStatus}, setting_status = #{settingStatus}, actual_status = #{actualStatus}, in_temperature = #{inTemp}, out_temperature = #{outTemp}, voltage = #{voltage}, valve_time = IFNULL(#{valveTime}, NOW()), signal_strength = #{csq}, reporting_interval = #{reportInterval}, interval_unit = #{reportingUnit}, valid_time = #{validTime}, total_degree = #{totalDegree}, dtu_status = #{dtuStatus}, ins_flow = #{insFlow}, update_time = NOW(), scope_status = 9 WHERE meter_num = #{meterNum}
AND meter_arc_name = #{meterInfo}

update.foreach:
UPDATE pr_heat_valve_archive SET valve_status = #{meterInfo.valveStatus}, setting_status = #{meterInfo.settingStatus}, actual_status = #{meterInfo.actualStatus}, in_temperature = #{meterInfo.inTemp}, out_temperature = #{meterInfo.outTemp}, voltage = #{meterInfo.voltage}, valve_time = IFNULL(#{meterInfo.valveTime}, NOW()), signal_strength = #{meterInfo.csq}, reporting_interval = #{meterInfo.reportInterval}, interval_unit = #{meterInfo.reportingUnit}, valid_time = #{meterInfo.validTime}, total_degree = #{meterInfo.totalDegree}, dtu_status = #{meterInfo.dtuStatus}, update_time = NOW(), scope_status = 9 WHERE meter_num = #{meterInfo.meterNum}
AND meter_arc_name = #{meterInfo.meterArcName}

mapper.update:
UPDATE pr_heat_unit_valve_archive SET valve_status = #{valveStatus}, setting_status = #{settingStatus}, actual_status = #{actualStatus}, in_temperature = #{inTemp}, out_temperature = #{outTemp}, voltage = #{voltage}, valve_time = IFNULL(#{valveTime}, NOW()), signal_strength = #{csq}, reporting_interval = #{reportInterval}, interval_unit = #{reportingUnit}, valid_time = #{validTime}, total_degree = #{totalDegree}, dtu_status = #{dtuStatus}, update_time = NOW() WHERE meter_num = #{meterNum}
AND meter_arc_name = #{meterInfo}

update.foreach:
UPDATE pr_heat_unit_valve_archive SET valve_status = #{meterData.valveStatus}, setting_status = #{meterData.settingStatus}, actual_status = #{meterData.actualStatus}, in_temperature = #{meterData.inTemp}, out_temperature = #{meterData.outTemp}, voltage = #{meterData.voltage}, valve_time = IFNULL(#{meterData.valveTime}, NOW()), signal_strength = #{meterData.csq}, reporting_interval = #{meterData.reportInterval}, interval_unit = #{meterData.reportingUnit}, valid_time = #{meterData.validTime}, total_degree = #{meterData.totalDegree}, dtu_status = #{meterData.dtuStatus}, update_time = NOW() WHERE meter_num = #{meterData.meterNum}
AND meter_arc_name = #{meterData.meterArcName}

mapper.update:
UPDATE pr_heat_temp_archive SET temper = #{temperature}, humidity = #{humi}, voltage = #{voltage}, report_time = #{readTime}, reporting_interval = #{reportingInterval}, interval_unit = #{reportingUnit}, valid_time = #{validTime}, signal_strength = #{csq}, report_number = #{totalDegree}, report_succ_num = #{reportSuccNum}, collect_interval = #{collectInterval}, collect_unit = #{collectUnit}, collect_num = #{collectTime}, collect_time = #{collectDate}, mov_place = #{movPlace}, valve_status = #{valveStatus} WHERE meter_num = #{meterNum}
AND meter_arc_name = #{meterInfo}

UPDATE pr_heat_hot_archive SET status1 = #{valveStatus}, out_temperature = #{outTemp}, in_temperature = #{inTemp}, voltage = #{voltage}, valve_time = #{readTime}, cell_status = #{voltageStatus}, total_flow = #{totalFlow}, signal_strength = #{csq}, total_used = #{totalHeat}, cur_flow = #{flowRate}, thermal_power = #{thermalPower}, current_reading = #{currentPower}, dtu_status = #{dtuStatus}, status2 = #{status1} WHERE meter_num = #{meterNum}
AND meter_arc_name = #{meterInfo}

UPDATE pr_heat_unit_hot_archive SET status1 = #{valveStatus}, out_temperature = #{outTemp}, in_temperature = #{inTemp}, voltage = #{voltage}, valve_time = #{readTime}, cell_status = #{voltageStatus}, total_flow = #{totalFlow}, signal_strength = #{csq}, total_used = #{totalHeat}, cur_flow = #{flowRate}, thermal_power = #{thermalPower}, current_reading = #{currentPower}, dtu_status = #{dtuStatus}, status2 = #{status1} WHERE meter_num = #{meterNum}
AND meter_arc_name = #{meterInfo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pr_heat_reading (id, meter_arc_code, meter_num, st, setting_status, valve_status, in_temperature, out_temperature, diff_temperature, voltage, read_time, reporting_interval, reporting_unit, valid_time, total_degree, csq, flow_rate, create_time, type) VALUES (REPLACE(UUID(), '-', ''), meter_arc_code, #{meterNum}, #{valveStatus}, #{settingStatus}, #{actualStatus}, #{inTemp}, #{outTemp}, #{outTemp} - #{inTemp}, #{voltage}, #{valveTime}, #{reportInterval}, #{reportingUnit}, #{validTime}, #{totalDegree}, #{csq}, #{insFlow}, NOW(), '1')

INSERT INTO pr_heat_reading (id, meter_arc_code, meter_num, st, setting_status, valve_status, in_temperature, out_temperature, diff_temperature, voltage, read_time, reporting_interval, reporting_unit, valid_time, total_degree, csq, create_time, type) VALUES
(REPLACE(UUID(), '-', ''), meter_arc_code, #{item.meterNum}, #{item.valveStatus}, #{item.settingStatus}, #{item.actualStatus}, #{item.inTemp}, #{item.outTemp}, #{item.outTemp} - #{item.inTemp}, #{item.voltage}, #{item.valveTime}, #{item.reportInterval}, #{item.reportingUnit}, #{item.validTime}, #{item.totalDegree}, #{item.csq}, NOW(), '1')

INSERT INTO pr_heat_reading (id, meter_num, type, st, setting_status, valve_status, in_temperature, out_temperature, voltage, read_time, reporting_interval, reporting_unit, csq, valve_model, user_set_temp, room_temp, avg_temp, work_time, total_open_time, cold_flg, wkq_lock, temp_low, temp_high, ins_flow, create_time) VALUES (REPLACE(UUID(), '-', ''), #{meterNum}, '1', #{valveStatus}, #{settingStatus}, #{actualStatus}, #{inTemp}, #{outTemp}, #{voltage}, #{valveTime}, #{reportInterval}, #{reportingUnit}, #{csq}, #{valveModel}, #{userSetTemp}, #{roomTemp}, #{avgTemp}, #{workTime}, #{totalOpenTime}, #{coldFlg}, #{wkqLock}, #{tempLow}, #{tempHigh}, #{insFlow}, NOW())

INSERT INTO pr_heat_reading (id, meter_num, temperature, humi, voltage, read_time, reporting_interval, reporting_unit, valid_time, csq, total_degree, report_succ_num, collect_interval, collect_unit, collect_time, create_time, type, mov_place, valve_status) VALUES (REPLACE(UUID(), '-', ''), #{meterNum}, #{temperature}, #{humi}, #{voltage}, #{collectDate}, #{reportingInterval}, #{reportingUnit}, #{validTime}, #{csq}, #{totalDegree}, #{reportSuccNum}, #{collectInterval}, #{collectUnit}, #{collectTime}, NOW(), '3', #{movPlace}, #{valveStatus})

INSERT INTO pr_heat_reading (id, meter_num, out_temperature, in_temperature, voltage, read_time, power_state, st, total_flow, csq, total_heat, flow_rate, current_flow, heat_power, current_power, create_time, rb_status1, type) VALUES (REPLACE(UUID(), '-', ''), #{meterNum}, #{outTemp}, #{inTemp}, #{voltage}, #{readTime}, #{voltageStatus}, #{valveStatus}, #{totalFlow}, #{csq}, #{totalHeat}, #{flowRate}, #{currentFlow}, #{thermalPower}, #{currentPower}, NOW(), #{status1}, '2')
mapper.update: UPDATE pr_house SET valve_open = ( SELECT CASE t2.instruction_type WHEN 1 THEN 100 WHEN 2 THEN 0 WHEN 3 THEN t2.instruction END FROM pr_heat_valve_archive t1 INNER JOIN ht_tasks_perform t2 ON t1.id = t2.meter_id AND t1.meter_num = t2.meter_num WHERE pr_house.id = t1.house_id AND t2.id = #{guid} AND t2.instruction_type IN (1, 2, 3) LIMIT 1 ) WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM pr_heat_valve_archive t1 INNER JOIN ht_tasks_perform t2 ON t1.id = t2.meter_id AND t1.meter_num = t2.meter_num WHERE pr_house.id = t1.house_id AND t2.id = #{guid} AND t2.instruction_type IN (1, 2, 3) )

UPDATE pr_unit SET valve_open = ( SELECT CASE t2.instruction_type WHEN 1 THEN 100 WHEN 2 THEN 0 WHEN 3 THEN t2.instruction END FROM pr_heat_unit_valve_archive t1 INNER JOIN ht_tasks_perform t2 ON t1.id = t2.meter_id AND t1.meter_num = t2.meter_num WHERE pr_unit.id = t1.unit_id AND t2.id = #{guid} AND t2.instruction_type IN (1, 2, 3) LIMIT 1 ) WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM pr_heat_unit_valve_archive t1 INNER JOIN ht_tasks_perform t2 ON t1.id = t2.meter_id AND t1.meter_num = t2.meter_num WHERE pr_unit.id = t1.unit_id AND t2.id = #{guid} AND t2.instruction_type IN (1, 2, 3) )

UPDATE pr_heat_valve_archive SET valve_status = ( SELECT CASE t2.instruction_type WHEN 1 THEN 1 WHEN 2 THEN 2 WHEN 3 THEN 1 END FROM ht_tasks_perform t2 WHERE t2.id = #{guid} AND t2.instruction_type IN (1, 2, 3) AND pr_heat_valve_archive.id = t2.meter_id AND pr_heat_valve_archive.meter_num = t2.meter_num LIMIT 1 ), setting_status = ( SELECT CASE t2.instruction_type WHEN 1 THEN 100 WHEN 2 THEN 0 WHEN 3 THEN t2.instruction END FROM ht_tasks_perform t2 WHERE t2.id = #{guid} AND t2.instruction_type IN (1, 2, 3) AND pr_heat_valve_archive.id = t2.meter_id AND pr_heat_valve_archive.meter_num = t2.meter_num LIMIT 1 ), actual_status = ( SELECT CASE t2.instruction_type WHEN 1 THEN 100 WHEN 2 THEN 0 WHEN 3 THEN t2.instruction END FROM ht_tasks_perform t2 WHERE t2.id = #{guid} AND t2.instruction_type IN (1, 2, 3) AND pr_heat_valve_archive.id = t2.meter_id AND pr_heat_valve_archive.meter_num = t2.meter_num LIMIT 1 ) WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ht_tasks_perform t2 WHERE t2.id = #{guid} AND t2.instruction_type IN (1, 2, 3) AND pr_heat_valve_archive.id = t2.meter_id AND pr_heat_valve_archive.meter_num = t2.meter_num )

UPDATE pr_heat_unit_valve_archive SET valve_status = ( SELECT CASE t2.instruction_type WHEN 1 THEN 1 WHEN 2 THEN 2 WHEN 3 THEN 1 END FROM ht_tasks_perform t2 WHERE t2.id = #{guid} AND t2.instruction_type IN (1, 2, 3) AND pr_heat_unit_valve_archive.id = t2.meter_id AND pr_heat_unit_valve_archive.meter_num = t2.meter_num LIMIT 1 ), setting_status = ( SELECT CASE t2.instruction_type WHEN 1 THEN 100 WHEN 2 THEN 0 WHEN 3 THEN t2.instruction END FROM ht_tasks_perform t2 WHERE t2.id = #{guid} AND t2.instruction_type IN (1, 2, 3) AND pr_heat_unit_valve_archive.id = t2.meter_id AND pr_heat_unit_valve_archive.meter_num = t2.meter_num LIMIT 1 ), actual_status = ( SELECT CASE t2.instruction_type WHEN 1 THEN 100 WHEN 2 THEN 0 WHEN 3 THEN t2.instruction END FROM ht_tasks_perform t2 WHERE t2.id = #{guid} AND t2.instruction_type IN (1, 2, 3) AND pr_heat_unit_valve_archive.id = t2.meter_id AND pr_heat_unit_valve_archive.meter_num = t2.meter_num LIMIT 1 ) WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ht_tasks_perform t2 WHERE t2.id = #{guid} AND t2.instruction_type IN (1, 2, 3) AND pr_heat_unit_valve_archive.id = t2.meter_id AND pr_heat_unit_valve_archive.meter_num = t2.meter_num )

UPDATE pr_heat_command_valve_archive SET valve_status = ( SELECT CASE t2.instruction_type WHEN 1 THEN 1 WHEN 2 THEN 2 WHEN 3 THEN 1 END FROM ht_tasks_perform t2 WHERE t2.id = #{guid} AND t2.instruction_type IN (1, 2, 3) AND pr_heat_command_valve_archive.id = t2.meter_id AND pr_heat_command_valve_archive.meter_num = t2.meter_num LIMIT 1 ), setting_status = ( SELECT CASE t2.instruction_type WHEN 1 THEN 100 WHEN 2 THEN 0 WHEN 3 THEN t2.instruction END FROM ht_tasks_perform t2 WHERE t2.id = #{guid} AND t2.instruction_type IN (1, 2, 3) AND pr_heat_command_valve_archive.id = t2.meter_id AND pr_heat_command_valve_archive.meter_num = t2.meter_num LIMIT 1 ), actual_status = ( SELECT CASE t2.instruction_type WHEN 1 THEN 100 WHEN 2 THEN 0 WHEN 3 THEN t2.instruction END FROM ht_tasks_perform t2 WHERE t2.id = #{guid} AND t2.instruction_type IN (1, 2, 3) AND pr_heat_command_valve_archive.id = t2.meter_id AND pr_heat_command_valve_archive.meter_num = t2.meter_num LIMIT 1 ) WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ht_tasks_perform t2 WHERE t2.id = #{guid} AND t2.instruction_type IN (1, 2, 3) AND pr_heat_command_valve_archive.id = t2.meter_id AND pr_heat_command_valve_archive.meter_num = t2.meter_num )

UPDATE pr_heat_command_unit_valve_archive SET valve_status = ( SELECT CASE t2.instruction_type WHEN 1 THEN 1 WHEN 2 THEN 2 WHEN 3 THEN 1 END FROM ht_tasks_perform t2 WHERE t2.id = #{guid} AND t2.instruction_type IN (1, 2, 3) AND pr_heat_command_unit_valve_archive.id = t2.meter_id AND pr_heat_command_unit_valve_archive.meter_num = t2.meter_num LIMIT 1 ), setting_status = ( SELECT CASE t2.instruction_type WHEN 1 THEN 100 WHEN 2 THEN 0 WHEN 3 THEN t2.instruction END FROM ht_tasks_perform t2 WHERE t2.id = #{guid} AND t2.instruction_type IN (1, 2, 3) AND pr_heat_command_unit_valve_archive.id = t2.meter_id AND pr_heat_command_unit_valve_archive.meter_num = t2.meter_num LIMIT 1 ), actual_status = ( SELECT CASE t2.instruction_type WHEN 1 THEN 100 WHEN 2 THEN 0 WHEN 3 THEN t2.instruction END FROM ht_tasks_perform t2 WHERE t2.id = #{guid} AND t2.instruction_type IN (1, 2, 3) AND pr_heat_command_unit_valve_archive.id = t2.meter_id AND pr_heat_command_unit_valve_archive.meter_num = t2.meter_num LIMIT 1 ) WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ht_tasks_perform t2 WHERE t2.id = #{guid} AND t2.instruction_type IN (1, 2, 3) AND pr_heat_command_unit_valve_archive.id = t2.meter_id AND pr_heat_command_unit_valve_archive.meter_num = t2.meter_num )

UPDATE pr_heat_command_valve_archive SET valve_status = #{valveStatus}, setting_status = #{settingStatus}, actual_status = #{actualStatus}, in_temperature = #{inTemp}, out_temperature = #{outTemp}, voltage = #{voltage}, valve_time = IFNULL(#{valveTime}, NOW()), signal_strength = #{csq}, reporting_interval = #{reportInterval}, interval_unit = #{reportingUnit}, valid_time = #{validTime}, total_degree = #{totalDegree}, dtu_status = #{dtuStatus}, update_time = NOW() WHERE meter_num = #{meterNum}
AND meter_arc_name = #{meterInfo}

UPDATE pr_heat_command_unit_valve_archive SET valve_status = #{valveStatus}, setting_status = #{settingStatus}, actual_status = #{actualStatus}, in_temperature = #{inTemp}, out_temperature = #{outTemp}, voltage = #{voltage}, valve_time = IFNULL(#{valveTime}, NOW()), signal_strength = #{csq}, reporting_interval = #{reportInterval}, interval_unit = #{reportingUnit}, valid_time = #{validTime}, total_degree = #{totalDegree}, dtu_status = #{dtuStatus}, update_time = NOW() WHERE meter_num = #{meterNum}
AND meter_arc_name = #{meterInfo}
UPDATE pr_heat_valve_archive SET scope_status = #{valveStatus}, scope_time = NOW() WHERE meter_num = #{meterNum}

UPDATE pr_heat_valve_archive SET scope_status = 0, scope_time = NOW() WHERE meter_num IN
#{item.meterNum}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ht_tasks_perform ( id, instruction_id, instruction_type, instruction, number, intervall, unit, duration, org_id, company_id, concentrator_code, tele_product_id, tele_api_key, tele_app_key, device_id, meter_num, meter_id, meter_arc_code, status, instruction_status, send_time, tasks_id, group_id, strategy_id, command_index, fore_start, orderr, create_time, create_by, in_temp, out_temp, room_temp, valve_open, imei, dtu_num, chan_num, out_temp_pj, cur_flow_compute, group_data ) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.instructionId}, #{item.instructionType}, #{item.instruction}, #{item.number}, #{item.intervall}, #{item.unit}, #{item.duration}, #{item.orgId}, #{item.companyId}, #{item.concentratorCode}, #{item.teleProductId}, #{item.teleApiKey}, #{item.teleAppKey}, #{item.deviceId}, #{item.meterNum}, #{item.meterId}, #{item.meterArcCode}, #{item.status}, #{item.instructionStatus}, #{item.sendTime}, #{item.tasksId}, #{item.groupId}, #{item.strategyId}, #{item.commandIndex}, #{item.foreStart}, #{item.orderr}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.inTemp}, #{item.outTemp}, #{item.roomTemp}, #{item.valveOpen}, #{item.imei}, #{item.dtuNum}, #{item.chanNum}, #{item.outTempPj}, #{item.curFlowCompute}, #{item.groupData, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler})

update.foreach: UPDATE ht_tasks_perform SET status = '2', send_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{item.id} AND status IN (0, 1)

UPDATE ht_tasks_perform a INNER JOIN ( SELECT group_id, command_index, dtu_num, chan_num FROM ht_tasks_perform WHERE id = #{item.id} ) b ON a.group_id = b.group_id AND a.command_index = b.command_index AND a.dtu_num = b.dtu_num AND FIND_IN_SET(a.chan_num, b.chan_num) > 0 SET status = '2', send_time = NOW() WHERE IFNULL(b.group_id, '') != '' AND status IN (0, 1)

mapper.update: UPDATE ht_tasks_perform SET instruction_status = #{valveStatus}, send_time = NOW() WHERE meter_num = #{meterNum} AND instruction_type = #{command} AND status IN (0, 1, 2) AND (group_id, command_index) IN ( SELECT group_id, command_index FROM (SELECT group_id, command_index FROM ht_tasks_perform WHERE id = #{guid}) AS temp WHERE IFNULL(temp.group_id, '') != '' )
UPDATE pr_heat_temp_archive SET valve_status = #{valveStatus}, update_time = NOW() WHERE meter_num = #{meterNum}
UPDATE pr_heat_temp_archive SET valve_status = #{valveStatus}, update_time = NOW() WHERE meter_num = #{meterNum}
UPDATE pr_heat_valve_archive SET update_time = NOW(), scope_status = #{valveStatus}, scope_time = NOW() WHERE meter_num = #{meterNum}
UPDATE pr_heat_dtu_archive SET status = #{valveStatus}, latest_time = NOW(), chan_num = #{channelNum}, update_time = NOW() WHERE dtu_num = #{dtuNum}
UPDATE pr_heat_dtu_archive SET status = #{valveStatus}, last_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE dtu_num = #{dtuNum}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ht_alert (id, meter_id, is_charged, alert_type, alert_time, org_id, company_id, valve, in_temp, out_temp, room_temp, create_time) SELECT REPLACE(UUID(), '-', ''), a.id, c.pay_status, #{valveStatus}, NOW(), a.org_id, a.company_id, a.actual_status, c.in_temp, c.out_temp, c.room_temp, NOW() FROM pr_heat_valve_archive a LEFT JOIN pr_house c ON c.id = a.house_id WHERE a.meter_num = #{meterNum}

INSERT INTO ht_alert (id, meter_id, alert_type, alert_time, org_id, company_id, valve, in_temp, out_temp, room_temp, create_time) SELECT REPLACE(UUID(), '-', ''), a.id, a.actual_status, NOW(), a.org_id, a.company_id, #{valveStatus}, a.in_temperature, a.out_temperature, '0', NOW() FROM pr_heat_unit_valve_archive a WHERE a.meter_num = #{meterNum}
mapper.update: UPDATE pr_heat_valve_archive SET dtu_status = '2' WHERE meter_num = #{meterNum} AND dtu_num IS NOT NULL
UPDATE pr_heat_unit_valve_archive SET dtu_status = '2' WHERE meter_num = #{meterNum} AND dtu_num IS NOT NULL
UPDATE pr_heat_hot_archive SET dtu_status = '2' WHERE meter_num = #{meterNum} AND dtu_num IS NOT NULL
UPDATE pr_heat_unit_hot_archive SET dtu_status = '2' WHERE meter_num = #{meterNum} AND dtu_num IS NOT NULL

UPDATE pr_heat_valve_archive SET update_time = NOW(), valve_time = IFNULL(#{valveTime}, NOW()), signal_strength = #{csq}, reporting_interval = #{reportInterval}, interval_unit = #{reportingUnit}, cold_flg = #{coldFlg}, wkq_lock = #{wkqLock}, temp_low = #{tempLow}, temp_high = #{tempHigh}, scope_status = 9 WHERE meter_num = #{meterNum}
AND meter_arc_name = #{meterInfo}

UPDATE pr_heat_valve_archive SET update_time = NOW(), valve_time = IFNULL(#{valveTime}, NOW()), user_set_temp = #{userSetTemp}, room_temp = #{roomTemp}, avg_temp = #{avgTemp}, work_time = #{workTime}, total_open_time = #{totalOpenTime}, scope_status = 9 WHERE meter_num = #{meterNum}
AND meter_arc_name = #{meterInfo}

UPDATE pr_heat_valve_archive SET valve_status = #{valveStatus}, setting_status = #{settingStatus}, actual_status = #{actualStatus}, in_temperature = #{inTemp}, out_temperature = #{outTemp}, voltage = #{voltage}, valve_time = IFNULL(#{valveTime}, NOW()), signal_strength = #{csq}, update_time = NOW(), valve_model = #{valveModel}, user_set_temp = #{userSetTemp}, room_temp = #{roomTemp}, avg_temp = #{avgTemp}, work_time = #{workTime}, total_open_time = #{totalOpenTime}, scope_status = 9 WHERE meter_num = #{meterNum}
AND meter_arc_name = #{meterInfo}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO pr_use_valve_log ( id, type, meter_num, content, room_num, other_code, org_name, building_name, building_id, unit_code, house_id, pay_status, user_name, phone, org_id, company_id, create_by, create_by_name, create_time ) VALUES
(SELECT REPLACE(UUID(), '-', ''), #{item.instructionType}, #{item.meterNum}, CASE #{item.instructionType} WHEN 1 THEN '开阀-100' WHEN 2 THEN '关阀-0' WHEN 3 THEN CONCAT('角度调整-', #{item.instruction}, '30') WHEN 5 THEN '制动' WHEN 6 THEN CONCAT('设置上报-', #{item.instruction}, '30') END, h.room_num, h.other_code, h.org_name, h.building_name, h.building_id, h.unit_code, hva.house_id, h.pay_status, uh.user_name, uh.phone, #{item.orgId}, #{item.companyId}, #{item.createBy}, su.user_name, NOW() FROM pr_heat_valve_archive hva INNER JOIN pr_house h ON hva.house_id = h.id LEFT JOIN pr_user_house uh ON hva.house_id = uh.house_id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON su.id = #{item.createBy} WHERE hva.id = #{item.meterId} LIMIT 1)
mapper.select:
SELECT b.id, b.org_name, b.org_id, b.building_name, b.building_id, b.unit_code, b.room_num, b.company_id, b.other_code, b.pay_status, b.update_time, c.user_name, c.phone, a.meter_num, a.valve_status, a.meter_arc_code, a.meter_arc_name, a.update_time AS 'meterUpdateTime' FROM pr_heat_valve_archive a INNER JOIN pr_house b ON b.id = a.house_id LEFT JOIN pr_user_house c ON c.house_id = a.house_id WHERE a.company_id = #{companyId} AND a.id IN
#{meterId}
SELECT a.*, b.name AS 'meterInfo' FROM ht_tasks_perform a LEFT JOIN mt_tc_valve b ON b.code = a.meter_arc_code WHERE a.company_id = #{companyId} AND a.status = '0'
SELECT * FROM ht_tasks_perform WHERE tasks_id = #{tasksId} AND group_id = #{groupId} ORDER BY command_index DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT a.*, b.pay_status AS "prHouse.payStatus", b.is_special AS "prHouse.isSpecial" FROM pr_heat_valve_archive a LEFT JOIN pr_house b ON b.id = a.house_id WHERE a.meter_num = #{meterNum}
